titles.title: When You Walked into the Room

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v8 v8 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When You walk into the room Everything changes Darkness starts to tremble At the light that You bring

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And when You walk into the room Every heart starts burning And nothing matters more Than just to sit here at Your feet And worship You We worship You, oh

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We love You We'll never stop We can't live without You, Jesus We love You And we can't get enough All this is for You, Jesus

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When You walk into the room Sickness starts to vanish Every hopeless situation ceases to exist

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And when You walk into the room The dead begin to rise 'Cause there is resurrection life in all You do

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: We love You We'll never stop Can't live without You, Jesus We love You And we can't get enough All this is for You, Jesus Oh, Jesus

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Come and consume, God All we are We give You permission Our hearts are Yours

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: We want You, we want You Come and consume, God All we are We give You permission Our hearts are Yours

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: We want You, we want You We love You We'll never stop Can't live without You, Jesus We love You And we can't get enough All this is for You, Jesus Oh, how we love You Oh, how we love You
